chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Mukatab (contracted slave)

text: 5743 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "اَلْمُكَاتَبُ يَرِثُ وَ يُورَثُ عَلَى قَدْرِ مَا أَدَّى".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5743 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Mansur ibn Hazim from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said: "A mukatab (a slave under a contract for freedom) inherits and is inherited from according to the proportion of what he has paid off."
